title: vigna unguiculata var. sesquipedalis
intro: Vigna unguiculata var. sesquipedalis, also known as the yardlong bean or asparagus bean, is a variety of the cowpea plant that is characterized by its long, thin pods and edible beans. The medicinal properties of Vigna unguiculata var. sesquipedalis include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Vigna unguiculata var. sesquipedalis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood sugar levels, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Vigna unguiculata var. sesquipedalis is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and can also be consumed raw or cooked as a vegetable in various Asian cuisines.
